name: Almost Better Than Sex Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to package instructions and pour into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for the time specified on the package.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the cake after about 10 minutes of baking.
6. Continue baking until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely.
8. Poke holes in the hot cake using the handle of a wooden spoon.
9. Pour sweetened condensed milk over the cake and let it cool.
10. Drizzle with caramel sauce, then top with Cool Whip and crushed heath bars.
